# Regex patterns (ERE) that MUST NOT appear in the rendered hermes.container.
# One per line; blank lines and #-comments are skipped. If any pattern matches,
# _check_quadlet fails. These guard the hardening the README promises.

# Privilege escapes
--privileged
^Privileged=true
^AddCapability=
^CapAdd=

# Sandbox bypass
seccomp=unconfined
apparmor=unconfined

# Container sockets — would make agent escape host-root-equivalent
docker\.sock
podman\.sock

# Public binding — never publish on a shared/public VM
PublishPort=[^#]*0\.0\.0\.0:

# UserNS overrides — see template comment about why we don't set this
^UserNS=
